questionHtml: Explain why an increase in temperature increases the rate of reaction.
markschemeHtml:
more/greater proportion of molecules with E Ea ✔

greater frequency/probability/chance of collisions «between the molecules»
OR
more collision per unit of time/second ✔

meta.title: Explain why an increase in temperature increases the rate of reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
